extra.reason: DONE: aoa-codeprobe-shim crate: codeprobe stream-json transcript -> ordered 8-span aoa_trace::Trace (order+targets preserved, write.blocked on denial, abstain on no-write, unmapped tools surfaced via warnings). 16 tests. Merged via wave-setA-review at a97dda92dbcbdad581c8806f85f9ab29ce224ed5. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: aoa-bench crate: codeprobe-mined task loader -> AOA inputs; held-out provenance External/NativeComposed/None (never SynthesizedFromVisible) -> gap:unavailable; <2 accepted-solutions -> InsufficientAcceptedSolutions, never fabricated. 12 tests. Follow-up aoa-d6t.2 filed for backend-identity provenance audit. Merged via wave-setA-review at d7edbcbf0609fc1e5fb8896e5ba391a26dda475d. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: aoa-scip-graph crate: real index -> aoa_metrics::SymbolGraph + G_t/I_t with R15 tiering (Scip high / BestEffort low / Degraded zero-weight, R0-ineligible). Phase-4 HIGH fix: degrade now preserves root cause via IndexedRepo.degrade_reason. 15 tests. Merged via wave-setA-review at 0069184a0027f21d1d044b4b2ce19737fefbfa42. BRANCH LEFT FOR USER: wave-setA-review not yet merged into main; user must merge or work is orphaned.

DONE: 'aoa eval run' post-processes a codeprobe run into per-task AOA metric records (4 process metrics + reward-hacking gap), composing the shim/scip-graph/bench/metrics/gap crates behind a nested EvalCommand. Honest-degradation MVP per architect review (F_edit from write-spans, degrade-on-no-graph-source, visible_unobserved, edit-locality null on <2 solutions, per-trial fail-loud + nonzero exit). All 5 ACs met; 21 cli tests; clippy/fmt clean. Follow-ups: aoa-d6t.1/.2/.5. Merged on main at 5833710eb7f2eb18460a2db20be88fae0476aa64.

DONE: implemented `aoa eval r0b`, a run-level R0b held-out-integrity gate composing aoa_gap::compare over two live codeprobe runs. held_out=ARTIFACT(mined ground_truth) leg, visible=DIRECT(test.sh) gameable-proxy leg from dual_composite scoring.json; exhaustive 4-way provenance reduce (synthesized=>hard error, any None=>gap:unavailable refuses label, all-External=>External, else NativeComposed); canaries injected from operator --canary manifest; refusal=>non-zero exit. Extracted shared discover_tasks (commands/codeprobe.rs). All 5 ACs met (AC1 provenance+available, AC2 leakage fires, AC3 unavailable refuses label, AC4 green). 6 unit + 26 integration tests; clippy -D warnings + fmt clean. Phase-4 fixes: escape untrusted task_id/error strings, fail-loud empty-provenance guard, drop clone, pub(crate), hoist canary validation; kept synthesized as hard-error (invariant violation, not routine refusal). Key decision: DIRECT/ARTIFACT->visible/held-out mapping grounded in codeprobe dual-verifier PRD. Follow-ups filed: aoa-d6t.1 (unbounded read + loader symlink), aoa-d6t.6 (leakage_detected visible_flat fail-open). Merged on main at cb48fd4635d1e589fd8ff542783841553b92a277.

DONE: R0 falsification runnable as a codeprobe experiment. Delivered AC1/AC2/AC4/AC5: 'aoa eval experiment' builder joins codeprobe repo-arm (AOA-migrated) vs harness-arm (harness-swap) held-out/artifact legs over the same mined tasks into an aoa_falsify::FalsifyInput; 'aoa falsify' reworked into the gate IO+policy shell (precondition_unmet wrapper for the <5-repo structural error so a 1-repo smoke is never mistaken for a real abstention; --build-meta convention-degradation abstention; --bias-warnings surfaced ALONGSIDE the verdict, escaped, no_independent_baseline flagged gate-invalidating); shared DualScoring+aggregate_provenance promoted into commands/codeprobe.rs; docs/r0_runbook.md + scripts/r0_experiment.sh chain it. Key decisions: per architect+security review, did NOT soften the aoa-falsify crate's <5-repo invariant (verdict laundering); eligibility never fabricated (confidence/calibrated required operator assertions, native_span derived); convention inputs degrade to honest inconclusive not admitting midpoints. 30 aoa tests + workspace green; clippy -D warnings + fmt clean; end-to-end smoke via the script emits falsification.json{verdict,precondition_unmet,bias surfaced}. AC3 live >=5-repo scale split to child aoa-dhk.1. Merged on main at af35f7095789234b367f5dc3ee3a33462b1b500a.

DONE: Replaced exact-f64 visible_flat equality in aoa-gap leakage_detected with a 1/min(N) tolerance band, closing the fail-open where a 1/N visible nudge suppressed leakage detection. Kept held_out_rose && canary_flipped corroboration (rejected canary-alone: over-fires on nondeterministic flips). 12 tests green (5 new), clippy -D warnings clean. Filed aoa-d6t.7 for the pre-existing canary-absence fail-open. Merged on main at f81f713f9140e52e4efcb0a9df31198b8587db7e.

DONE: Added resource bounds to all 5 untrusted-input parse paths in wave-setA. shim (Read::take 64MiB + fail-loud span cap + warnings sentinel), scip-graph (128MiB/8MiB caps + symlink-safe collect_py_files + skip-oversized-source), aoa-bench loader (16MiB cap + is_file symlink guard on variants), aoa bin (fsutil::read_to_string_capped for scoring.json on eval-run+r0b, MAX_TASK_DIRS cap + no-follow sentinel probes in discover_tasks). Key decisions: Read::take(max+1) over metadata().len() for TOCTOU/symlink safety; span cap fails loud (never silently truncates a metric-feeding trace) while warnings cap uses a visible sentinel; best_effort skips an oversized file rather than demoting the whole repo to Degraded; per-crate helpers map to native error types (no shared leaf crate). Phase-4 (3 reviewers): rejected a miscalculated span-cap-off-by-one HIGH; fixed a convergent MEDIUM (discover_tasks inner .is_file followed symlinks). All tests + clippy green. Deferred operator-supplied read sites to aoa-d6t.8. Merged on main at 2148b45.

DONE: Re-grounded NativeComposed provenance on codeprobe's REAL artifact divergence_report.json (schema consensus.v1), replacing a file-set-equality dedup that collapsed identical-file backends to None and a fictional ground_truth_<backend>.json source that codeprobe never emits. New AcceptedSolution{backend,files} carries identity; classify_provenance counts distinct backends; read_accepted_backends consumes codeprobe's decision=='shipped' (ZFC, no F1 re-derivation); accepted_solution_files() dedups+drops-empty for the edit-locality boundary (identical/empty backends -> loud InsufficientAcceptedSolutions, never degenerate floor==ceiling). Removed dead variant path. Phase-4 (3 reviewers, all APPROVE) folded: dropped files-empty filter to stop silent shipped->None demotion, fixed fictional pair_metrics fixture sub-schema, added identical-files + empty-backend tests. Key discovery surfaced to user (ground_truth_<backend>.json fiction) and approved re-direction. Deferred null/all-zeros-SHA External fix -> aoa-d6t.9. cargo test (full workspace) + clippy green. Merged on main at a4a4bd6404dfcf07d29798e2b9e442f9727b46c0.

DONE: Reject the git-null (all-zeros) ground_truth_commit so synthetic tasks no longer get contamination-free External provenance. Added meaningful_commit() (drops blank + all-'0'-char, ASCII null sentinel) wired into read_metadata + read_ground_truth; the .or() merge in load_task can't leak a null from either path. Migrated all 4 external-filelist-000 fixtures (both trees) off 0000...0 to a realistic non-zero SHA so they stay External legitimately; updated the exact-SHA assertion. Targeted to git-null only — all-ones placeholders (external-toml-003) untouched per the NOTE. Tests: meaningful_commit unit (zeros/blank/whitespace rejected; real/all-ones/partial-zero kept) + end-to-end null-commit->not-External loader test. Phase-4 (2 reviewers) APPROVE, only LOW doc notes folded. cargo test (full workspace) + clippy green. Merged on main at d02a2331f73990804ae3f281aa5363e1151b0eae.
